economic_notes: First Nation owns interests in Woodland Cree Industries Ltd., Woodland Cree Energy Inc., Woodland Cree Exploration Inc., 1024044 Alberta Ltd., Peace River Logging (50%), and Woodland Cree First Nation Business Trustee Corporation. Community Development Trust valued at $42.5M managed by Peace Hills Trust. Bison Ranch Project and Heavy Equipment Business programs active. Broadband project underway.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on two bases: (1) insufficient audit evidence on carrying value of certain investments including Woodland Cree Industries Ltd., Woodland Cree Energy Inc., Woodland Cree Exploration Inc., and Woodland Cree First Nation Business Trustee Corporation whose financial statements were not available at audit date; (2) asset retirement obligations not estimated or recorded. Six entities accounted for under modified equity method (GBEs). Woodland Cree First Nation Community Development Trust fully consolidated (1 subsidiary). Accumulated surplus includes $5,911,759 in remeasurement gains. Significant cash decline from $5.6M to $207K. Chief and Council remuneration schedule not extracted from available text ($2,405,429 total expense line). total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($3,640,273) + KTC ($10,527,237) + CMHC ($96,150) + FNDF ($641,903) + Government of Alberta ($1,541,957) = $16,447,520. osr = $29,158,418 - $16,447,520 = $12,710,898 includes investment income, trust income, and other revenue.
